title: Para Para Pattaampoochi Song Lyrics Kattradhu Thamizh
stanzas:
Para Para Pattaampoochi Song Lyrics Kattradhu Thamizh
#Yuvan #NaMuthukumar

Para para para para
pattaam poochi
thoda thoda thoda thoda
pala vannam aachu

idhu oru idhu oru
pudhu kannaamoochi
idhayathin vaanilai
adhu maari pochu

kanneerai thudaikkum
viralukku manam
yaendi kidakkudhe

thanneeril irukkum
erumbukku ilai
padagu aanadhe

Para para para para
pattaam poochi
thoda thoda thoda thoda
pala vannam aachu

idhu oru idhu oru
pudhu kannaamoochi
idhayathin vaanilai
adhu maari pochu

inbam oru puram endru
thunbam maru puram endru
sutri chuzhathu indha
mann melae.

thannathani aal endru
yaarum illai endru
ullam sollundhu indru
anbaale

yedho yedho oru unarchi
eri thazhalil mazhaiyin
kulirchi

kadal alaigal modhi
modhi manam
sirppam aagudhe

edhirile andha mazhalai
kaalam meendum
thirumbudhe

Para para para para
pattaam poochi
thoda thoda thoda thoda
pala vannam aachu

idhu oru idhu oru
pudhu kannaamoochi
idhayathin vaanilai
adhu maari pochu

Vazhkai enbadhu enna
pallip paadamum alla
kattruk kondathu mella
munnera.

kadhal enbadhu enna
pullik kolamum alla
kaatril kalaiyum podhum
thallaada

engo engo orr ulagam
unakkaaga kaathu kidakkum
nigazh kaalam nadhiyai
pola mella nagarndhu poguthe

nadhi kaayalaam
ninaivill ulla katchi
kaayumaa ?

Para para para para
pattaam poochi
thoda thoda thoda thoda
pala vannam aachu

idhu oru idhu oru
pudhu kannaamoochi
idhayathin vaanilai
adhu maari pochu

kanneerai thudaikkum
viralukku manam
yaendi kidakkudhe

thanneeril irukkum
erumbukku ilai
padagu aanadhe

Para para para para
pattaam poochi
thoda thoda thoda thoda
pala vannam aachu

idhu oru idhu oru
pudhu kannaamoochi
idhayathin vaanilai
adhu maari pochu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Para Para Pattaampoochi conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the vibrant emotions of youth and life.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Kattradhu Thamizh, this song represents a lively moment that emphasizes the protagonist's carefree spirit and zest for life.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Rahul Nambiar and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

Para Para Pattaampoochi was released on October 5, 2007.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Para Para Pattaampoochi from Kattradhu Thamizh is a vibrant and energetic number that encapsulates the spirit of celebration. It features catchy lyrics that evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it perfect for parties and festive occasions. The lively beats and Rahul Nambiar's dynamic vocals create an infectious atmosphere that encourages listeners to dance and enjoy life. Overall, the song conveys a message of youthful exuberance and the joy of living in the moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Para Para Pattaampoochi from Kattradhu Thamizh is an electrifying track that showcases the vibrant energy of Rahul Nambiar's vocals paired with Yuvan's dynamic composition. This song perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy, making it a must-listen for any party playlist. Dive into the rhythmic beats and catchy lyrics that will surely get you moving!
stanzaMeanings: This is a new butterfly, it has taken on many colors little by little.
This is a new butterfly, the sky of the heart has changed.
The heart that sheds tears is feeling something.
The leaf of the ant that lives in water is not a burden.
This is a new butterfly, it has taken on many colors little by little.
This is a new butterfly, the sky of the heart has changed.
Happiness is a place, and sorrow is another place that circles around this earth.
No one says that they are alone, today the heart speaks of love.
Something, something, a feeling rises like rain's coolness.
The waves of the sea are slowly becoming a melody.
That childhood time is returning again.
This is a new butterfly, it has taken on many colors little by little.
This is a new butterfly, the sky of the heart has changed.
Life is not just a song, it is slowly moving forward with learning.
Love is not just a form, it is enough to be in the air.
Somewhere, somewhere, a world is being created for you, slowly flowing like a river.
Is the memory of the river not there?
